title: Ranker questions — email-org for Rankett (2025)
html:
Ranker questions — email-org for Rankett (2025)

Source: 2025-12-21 Apple Note. 3-line operations Q-list for Rankett sales-ops, written 1 day after the Lift ATX product-thinking note.

TL;DR

  • Q1: How will we handle and stay organized with people replying to our emails?
  • Q2: How will we track email reply rate?
  • Q3: What information specifically do we need from our clients?
  • These are the CRM-and-data-model questions that the Rankett org needed to answer in Dec 2025 — same questions that get partially answered in the 2026 04 build doc.
  • "Ranker" misspelling in title — early-naming-fluidity moment; the brand stabilizes as Rankett by 2026-01.
  • Pattern: Yahir runs Q-lists as planning artifacts, not specs. Identifies frontiers of his own confusion, then pursues. Same as 2022 Jackson math Qs and 2026 03 AI accuracy Qs.
